nasb.text: Then he presented the second ram, the ram of ordination, and Aaron and his sons laid their hands on the head of the ram.

esv.text: Then he presented the other ram, the ram of ordination, and Aaron and his sons laid their hands on the head of the ram.

cnv.text: 他又把第二隻公綿羊牽來，就是承受聖職所獻的公綿羊；亞倫和他的兒子按手在公綿羊的頭上；

ccb.text: 摩西献上另一只为授圣职而献的公绵羊。亚伦父子们把手放在羊头上。
